title: U.S. stock futures tumble, oil surges as this weekend’s Iran developments rekindle uncertainty
summary: After three weeks of gains bringing the S&P 500 to record highs, weekend developments involving the Iran conflict have triggered sharp declines in stock futures and surging oil prices as investors brace for renewed uncertainty.
content: After a three-week-long rally that’s brought the S&P 500 to new record highs, investors are again bracing for uncertainty following a whirlwind of weekend developments concerning the war with Iran.

zh.title: 随着周末伊朗局势发展重燃不确定性，美国股指期货暴跌，油价飙升
zh.summary: 在标普500指数上升至创纪录高位三周后，涉及伊朗冲突的周末动态引发股指期货大幅下跌和油价飙升，投资者为重燃的不确定性做准备。

title: Oil prices jump as Strait of Hormuz tensions escalate
summary: Energy markets are experiencing significant volatility following recent U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran, as tensions in the critical Strait of Hormuz shipping corridor intensify oil prices.
content: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

zh.title: 随着霍尔木兹海峡局势升级，油价上涨
zh.summary: 在美国和以色列对伊朗进行最近的袭击后，能源市场经历了重大波动，随着关键的霍尔木兹海峡航运走廊的紧张局势加剧，油价上涨。

title: Oil prices jump after Iran and U.S. attack commercial ships as tensions escalate over Strait of Hormuz
summary: Crude oil prices surged as U.S. and Iranian attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz brought the two nations closer to renewed conflict, threatening one of the world's most critical energy shipping routes.
content: Crude oil prices surged Sunday, as the U.S. and Iran teetered on the brink of a renewed war after attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 伊朗和美国在霍尔木兹海峡对商船发动袭击后油价上升，紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 由于美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡对商船的攻击，原油价格飙升，使两国更接近重新冲突，威胁世界上最关键的能源运输路线之一。

title: Dow futures drop 400 points as Iranian war tensions escalate: Live updates
summary: President Trump announced the U.S. had fired on and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman, prompting significant declines in Dow futures as geopolitical tensions escalate.
content: President Donald Trump on Sunday said the U.S. had fired on and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman.

zh.title: 随着伊朗战争紧张局势升级，道琼斯期货下跌400点：实时更新
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国在阿曼湾对伊朗籍货轮开火并予以扣押，随着地缘政治紧张局势升级，道琼斯期货大幅下跌。

title: Why your recycled clothes could end up in this South American desert
summary: Discarded garments from around the world are accumulating in a South American country, highlighting the environmental impact and challenges of the global clothing recycling industry.
content: Old garments from around the world are being discarded in the South American country.

zh.title: 为什么你的回收衣服可能会最终出现在这个南美洲沙漠中
zh.summary: 来自世界各地的废弃衣服正在南美国家积累，突显了全球服装回收行业的环境影响和挑战。

title: The insider trading suspicions looming over Trump's presidency
summary: The BBC has identified a pattern of suspicious trading spikes that precede public announcements by President Trump, raising questions about potential insider trading during his administration.
content: The BBC has found a pattern of spikes in trades ahead of public announcements by the US president.

zh.title: 笼罩特朗普任期的内幕交易嫌疑
zh.summary: 英国广播公司(BBC)发现了一个模式，在特朗普总统公开声明前出现可疑的交易高峰，引发了对其政府期间可能存在内幕交易的质疑。

title: Eli Lilly in advanced talks to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics for over $2 billion, WSJ says
summary: Pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly is negotiating to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics in a deal valued at over $2 billion, with completion potentially as soon as Monday and additional milestone-based payments possible.
content: A deal could be reached as soon as Monday and could include additional payments tied to Kelonia meeting certain milestones, The Wall Street Journal reported.

zh.title: 据《华尔街日报》报道，礼来公司在洽谈以超过20亿美元的价格收购凯隆尼亚治疗公司
zh.summary: 制药巨头礼来公司正在协商收购凯隆尼亚治疗公司，交易价值超过20亿美元，最早可能在周一完成，并可能涉及基于里程碑的额外付款。

title: Here are things going right for stocks despite new Iran war setbacks
summary: Stock gains on Friday were driven as much by declining bond yields as by falling oil prices, while major tech stocks and the broader market momentum remain resilient despite Middle East tensions.
content: The big stock rally Friday had as much to do with bond yields going down as it did with oil plunging. The Mag 7 are also back.

zh.title: 尽管伊朗战争困局，股市仍有积极因素
zh.summary: 周五股市上涨的驱动力来自债券收益率下降和油价下跌，尽管中东局势紧张，但大型科技股和更广泛的市场动能仍保持韧性。

title: U.S. struck, seized Iranian-flagged ship Touska in Gulf of Oman, Trump says
summary: President Trump confirmed the U.S. seized the Iranian-flagged cargo ship Touska in the Gulf of Oman, which was previously on the U.S. Treasury's sanctions list due to a history of illegal activities.
content: The Iran-flagged Touska was on the U.S. Treasury's sanctions list because of a history of illegal activity, Trump said.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国在阿曼湾袭击并扣押伊朗籍船只图斯卡号
zh.summary: 特朗普总统确认美国在阿曼湾扣押了伊朗籍货轮图斯卡号，该船因历史上的非法活动而被列入美国财政部的制裁名单。

title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
summary: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor is in advanced funding discussions for a $2 billion raise at a valuation exceeding $50 billion, reflecting continued investor appetite for AI technologies.
content: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.

zh.title: 人工智能初创公司Cursor洽谈融资20亿美元，估值超500亿美元
zh.summary: 人工智能初创公司Cursor正在进行融资20亿美元的高级讨论，估值超过500亿美元，反映了投资者对人工智能技术的持续热情。

title: FBI Director Kash Patel vows to sue The Atlantic over alcohol abuse claims
summary: FBI Director Kash Patel announced plans to sue The Atlantic magazine over published claims regarding his alcohol consumption, stemming from an incident at the 2026 Olympic Games.
content: Kash Patel recently made headlines for chugging a beer after Team USA won the gold medal in ice hockey in the 2026 Olympic Games.

zh.title: 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔誓言因酗酒指控起诉《大西洋月刊》
zh.summary: 联邦调查局局长卡什·帕特尔宣布计划因《大西洋月刊》发表的关于他饮酒习惯的指控而起诉该杂志，该事件源于2026年奥运会期间发生的事件。

title: Businesses can claim refunds for Trump tariffs ruled unconstitutional starting Monday
summary: A refund system for businesses affected by tariffs declared unconstitutional by the U.S. Supreme Court launches Monday, allowing companies to recover costs from the disputed tariffs.
content: A refund system for businesses that paid tariffs ruled unconstitutional by the U.S. Supreme Court is scheduled to launch Monday.

zh.title: 企业可从周一开始申请被裁定违宪的特朗普关税退款
zh.summary: 美国最高法院裁定违宪的关税退款系统周一启动，允许受影响的企业收回争议关税造成的成本。

title: The S&P 500 blows past 7,000 in an epic comeback rally. Here’s why it can keep going.
summary: The S&P 500 has surpassed 7,000 in a major rally, driven by declining geopolitical concerns about the Iran conflict. Market sentiment suggests the rally can continue as investors shift focus away from international tensions.
content: The Iran war may or may not be nearing a conclusion. But as far as the stock market is concerned, it’s no longer been worth worrying about.

zh.title: 标普500指数突破7000点创意外反弹。它为何能继续上涨？
zh.summary: 标普500指数在一轮重大反弹中突破了7000点，受到对伊朗冲突地缘政治担忧下降的推动。市场情绪表明，随着投资者将重点转向其他方面，反弹可能会继续。

title: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
summary: Previously underperforming tech and software stocks, including Microsoft, are participating in the market rally after significant drawdowns. The rebound demonstrates the classic investing principle of buying quality stocks after sharp declines.
content: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.

zh.title: 曾经落后的软件股加入市场反弹。反弹中有经典的投资教训
zh.summary: 包括微软在内的之前表现不佳的科技和软件股在大幅下跌后参与了市场反弹。反弹展示了经典投资原则——在急剧下跌后购买优质股票。

title: Amazon, USPS and the risk of a widening delivery divide in rural America
summary: A new Amazon-USPS partnership could reshape rural delivery infrastructure, with significant implications for package delivery to underserved communities. The deal highlights growing disparities in logistics access between urban and rural areas.
content: The new deal between Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service has many implications, maybe none greater than what it means for package delivery to rural Americans.

zh.title: 亚马逊、美国邮政及美国农村配送差距扩大的风险
zh.summary: 亚马逊与美国邮政的新合作伙伴关系可能重塑农村配送基础设施，对向服务不足的社区配送包裹产生重大影响。这笔交易突显了城市和农村地区物流获取方面日益扩大的差异。

title: Gas prices may not drop below $3 a gallon until next year: Energy Secretary Wright
summary: U.S. gas prices have spiked above $4 per gallon, and the Energy Secretary predicts they won't return below $3 until next year. The sharp price increase reflects recent market pressures and broader energy market conditions.
content: Gas prices are more than $4 per gallon on average in the U.S. right now, a massive spike from just months ago.

zh.title: 汽油价格可能直到明年都不会跌至每加仑3美元以下：能源部长赖特
zh.summary: 美国汽油价格已飙升至每加仑4美元以上，能源部长预测明年之前价格不会回落到3美元以下。油价的急剧上升反映了最近的市场压力和更广泛的能源市场条件。

title: I'm a psychologist who studies couples: People in the happiest relationships do 5 things on Sundays—that most neglect
summary: Research by psychologist Mark Travers reveals that couples in the healthiest relationships practice five specific Sunday rituals to maintain emotional connection before the week begins. These check-in practices help partners stay aligned and emotionally synchronized.
content: Before a new week begins, the happiest couples pause. Mark Travers, a psychologist who studies couples, shares the five simple check-ins help them stay close and emotionally in sync.

zh.title: 我是研究伴侣关系的心理学家：最幸福的关系中的人在周日做五件事——大多数人忽视的事情
zh.summary: 心理学家马克·特拉弗斯的研究表明，最健康关系中的夫妇在周日练习五种特定的仪式，以在一周开始前维持情感联系。这些检查练习帮助伴侣保持一致和情感同步。

title: This year's college graduates face a changed student loan landscape
summary: The 2026 graduating class faces new student loan repayment options that differ from previous years, requiring graduates to navigate a changed landscape. The shifts in repayment policies directly impact May graduates entering the workforce.
content: Student loan borrowers graduating college in May will face different repayment options than in prior years. Here's what to know.

zh.title: 今年的大学毕业生面临改变了的学生贷款格局
zh.summary: 2026届毕业生面临与往年不同的新学生贷款还款选项，需要毕业生应对改变了的格局。还款政策的转变直接影响进入劳动力市场的五月份毕业生。

title: I’m planning to retire at 60. Should I sell my house and invest the $500,000?
summary: A prospective early retiree considers selling their $500,000 home to invest the proceeds, with the benefit of improved monthly cash flow of approximately $1,300 from renting. The decision involves weighing housing ownership against liquidity for retirement investment.
content: “Renting improves cash flow by about $1,300 a month.”

zh.title: 我计划60岁退休。我应该卖掉房子并投资这50万美元吗？
zh.summary: 一位有抱负的提前退休者考虑出售其50万美元的住宅以投资收益，以获得租赁带来的约1,300美元的月度现金流改善。这一决定涉及权衡住房所有权与退休投资的流动性。

title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for the long haul
summary: Top Wall Street analysts have identified three stocks with long-term bullish outlooks, helping investors navigate the complex equity universe. Following analyst ratings provides a data-driven approach to stock selection.
content: Picking stocks can be challenging due to the vast universe of equities. Investors can follow the ratings of top Street analysts and make informed decisions.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师看好这3只股票的长期表现
zh.summary: 华尔街顶级分析师已确定三只具有长期看涨前景的股票，帮助投资者在复杂的股票市场中导航。跟随分析师评级提供了一种数据驱动的选股方法。

title: From AI shopping to video, Alibaba is making the investments analysts want to see
summary: Alibaba is investing in AI-driven shopping and video technologies, moves that resonate with analysts and drive investor confidence. The company's stock is experiencing its strongest performance since January.
content: The Chinese tech company's shares are on track for their best month since January.

zh.title: 从AI购物到视频，阿里巴巴进行分析师希望看到的投资
zh.summary: 阿里巴巴正在投资AI驱动的购物和视频技术，这些举措引起分析师的共鸣并提升投资者信心。该公司的股票正经历自1月以来的最强表现。

title: These are HSBC's favorite stocks this earnings season
summary: HSBC has highlighted Alphabet and Amazon among its top stock picks for the current earnings season, signaling analyst confidence in these companies. The recommendations reflect HSBC's strategic assessment of which companies are positioned for strong results.
content: Alphabet and Amazon are among HSBC's top picks this earnings season, according to a recent note to clients.

zh.title: HSBC在本财报季的青睐股票
zh.summary: HSBC将Alphabet和Amazon列为本财报季的顶级股票选择，显示分析师对这些公司的信心。这些建议反映了HSBC对哪些公司有望取得良好业绩的战略评估。

title: Earnings playbook: Tesla and Boeing lead a big week of reports
summary: Tesla and Boeing headline a major earnings week featuring results from 88 S&P 500 companies, setting the stage for significant market-moving announcements. The week's reports will provide key insights into corporate performance across the economy.
content: Tesla and Boeing are among the 88 S&P 500 companies scheduled to post results.

zh.title: 财报剧本：特斯拉和波音领导大型财报周
zh.summary: 特斯拉和波音在88家标普500公司财报发布的重大财报周中领跑，为市场波动公告做准备。本周的财报将为经济中的企业表现提供关键洞察。

title: SiIicon Valley's AI agent hiccups: Wasted tokens and 'chaotic' systems
summary: Despite optimism from industry leaders like Nvidia's Jensen Huang, AI agents are experiencing operational inefficiencies including wasted tokens and system instability. The challenges highlight gaps between promising potential and current implementation realities.
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang told CNBC's Jim Cramer in March that AI agents are "definitely the next ChatGPT."

zh.title: 硅谷的AI代理故障：浪费的令牌和"混乱"的系统
zh.summary: 尽管Nvidia首席执行官黄仁勋等行业领袖保持乐观，但AI代理正在经历操作效率低下，包括浪费令牌和系统不稳定。这些挑战凸显了美好潜力与当前实施现实之间的差距。

title: A non-human race: Beijing half-marathon shows how far robots have come
summary: Beijing held its second robot half-marathon, demonstrating significant progress in robotics technology. The inaugural race last year faced widespread failures with most robots unable to finish, but improvements this year show how rapidly the technology is advancing.
content: The race's inaugural edition last year was riddled with mishaps, and most robots were unable to finish.

zh.title: 机器人竞赛：北京半程马拉松展示机器人技术进步
zh.summary: 北京举办了第二届机器人半程马拉松，展示了机器人技术的重大进展。去年的首届比赛面临广泛失败，大多数机器人无法完成，但今年的改进表明该技术进步之快。

title: Iran says talks continue while it retains control of Strait of Hormuz traffic
summary: Iran's top negotiator confirmed ongoing talks while asserting control over Strait of Hormuz shipping traffic. The statement comes after Trump warned the U.S. will not yield to pressure, highlighting tensions between the nations over nuclear negotiations.
content: Iran's top negotiator says his government has "no trust" in its enemies, after Trump says the U.S. won't be blackmailed.

zh.title: 伊朗称谈判继续进行，同时保留霍尔木兹海峡交通控制权
zh.summary: 伊朗谈判代表确认谈判继续进行，同时声称保留对霍尔木兹海峡航运交通的控制。这一声明发表之际，特朗普警告美国不会屈于压力，凸显了两国在核谈判上的紧张关系。

title: ‘It is their fault’: My condo board forgot to bill for storage fees. Must I pay retroactively?
summary: A condo board failed to bill residents for storage fees for seven to eight months and is now attempting to collect retroactively. The dispute raises questions about tenant obligations for administrative billing oversights by building management.
content: “They now intend to bill us for seven to eight months of storage fees.”

zh.title: "这是他们的错"：我的公寓董事会忘记收取存储费，我需要追溯缴付吗？
zh.summary: 一个公寓董事会在七到八个月内未能向居民收取存储费，现在试图追溯收取。这场纠纷引发了关于住户对建筑管理部门计费疏忽的法律义务的问题。

title: 'My school cannot afford free breakfast club'
summary: A school administrator says she cannot afford to staff the government's free breakfast club program due to budget constraints. The shortfall highlights funding gaps in implementing the government's nutrition initiative in schools.
content: Barbara Middleton says she cannot afford to staff the government's free breakfast clubs.

zh.title: 我的学校无法负担免费早餐俱乐部
zh.summary: 一位学校管理员表示，由于预算限制，她无法为政府的免费早餐俱乐部计划配备人员。这一不足突显了学校实施政府营养倡议时的资金缺口。

title: 'With four jobs in London I couldn't afford rent so I'm going to Manchester'
summary: Young Londoners including Lauren Elcock are relocating to cities like Manchester because London rents are unaffordable even with multiple jobs. The migration reflects broader housing affordability crisis pushing workers out of the capital.
content: Lauren Elcock is among the young Londoners who say rising rents are forcing them to quit the capital.

zh.title: 在伦敦有四份工作我还是买不起房租，所以我要去曼彻斯特
zh.summary: 包括劳伦·埃尔科克在内的年轻伦敦人正在迁往曼彻斯特等城市，因为即使有多份工作，伦敦的房租也负担不起。这一迁移反映了更广泛的住房可负担性危机正在推动工人离开首都。

title: North Korea fires ballistic missiles again, flexing muscle amid Iran war
summary: North Korea launched ballistic missiles in its fourth such test this month and seventh of the year, demonstrating military capabilities amid regional tensions. Analysts interpret the launches as a show of self-defense strength during escalating geopolitical conflict.
content: The launch is the fourth such operation this month and the seventh of the year. Experts say it is meant to display North Korea's self-defense capabilities.

zh.title: 朝鲜再次发射弹道导弹，在伊朗战争中展示实力
zh.summary: 朝鲜在本月第四次和今年第七次发射弹道导弹，展示了在区域紧张局势中的军事能力。分析人士将这些发射解释为在地缘政治冲突升级期间展示自卫力量。
